title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (C), PAGE 212, SUB-PARAGRAPH (6), FOR THE PROVINCE OF BATAAN, PARAGRAPHF,SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1855 / 55 OG No. 35, 7304 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2442, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (
